questions.question: Create a bar plot to illustrate the relationship between satisfaction level and repeat purchases. What insights can you gain from this visualization?
questions.hint: Consider using different colors or shapes for different levels of satisfaction

questions.question: A company has collected data on customer satisfaction levels and repeat purchases. Create a stacked bar chart to explore the relationship between satisfaction level and repeat purchases for different customer segments. What factors do you think contribute to the differences in repeat purchase behavior across segments?
questions.hint: Think about the role of demographics, purchase history, or loyalty program participation

questions.question: Design a bar plot to compare the average repeat purchase rates for customers with high, medium, and low satisfaction levels. How do these rates compare to the overall repeat purchase rate for the company? What implications does this have for customer retention strategies?
questions.hint: Consider using error bars to represent standard deviations or confidence intervals
